description: The Federal Highway Administration requires a climatological assessment of freeze-thaw cycling risk for Northern Hemisphere transportation infrastructure to inform spring maintenance budgets. Your analysis request is located at ~/Desktop/freeze_thaw_assessment_request.txt. Using NASA Panoply and the available NCEP surface air temperature climatology dataset in ~/PanoplyData/, identify the 'freeze-thaw belt' using January and March temperature fields. Deliver all required output files to the ~/Documents/FreezeThaw/ directory as specified in the request.
